backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build will target Java 17 bytecode and features, failing to utilize or comply with Java 21 requirements if enforced by downstream tooling or CI.

backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to explicitly use the release flag matching the java.version property.
backend-spring/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may not strictly enforce cross-compilation to the target JDK version, potentially allowing usage of APIs not available in the target runtime or failing to set the correct bytecode version.
